name: Alternative Data: Satellite + Credit Card Signal
description: Uses non-traditional data sources to predict company revenues before official earnings. Satellite imagery tracks parking lot occupancy at retailers, oil tank levels for energy, and cargo ship movements. Credit card panels from Affinity/Second Measure provide real-time consumer spending by company.
core_logic: alt_score = satellite_activity_zscore * 0.5 + cc_spend_growth * 0.5. If alt_score > threshold before earnings date, expect upside surprise → BUY. Volume anomaly used as proxy for alt data signal in this implementation.

sharpe_ratio.note: alpha decays as data becomes commoditized

risk.main_risk: Data quality issues; signal decay as data becomes widespread

pros: Large AUM capacity in equity markets
signal_buy: Volume z-score > 2.0 AND price return positive (demand surge confirmation)
signal_sell: Volume z-score > 2.0 AND price return negative (supply surge / selling)
